title: Plasma Physicist — Gas Dynamic Trap Fusion Device
about: ASPL Fusion (Agnira Sanlayan Pvt. Ltd.) is an applied plasma and neutron-systems company working on accelerator-based BNCT, domestic medical-isotope production, and industrial neutron applications, within established Indian regulatory and safety frameworks. Our medium-horizon programme phase introduces a Gas Dynamic Trap (GDT) — an axisymmetric linear-mirror neutron source — with REBCO HTS magnets in the 8–12 T range, neutral-beam-injection heating in the multi-MW class, and a multi-target isotope-irradiation carousel.
description: Lead plasma design, commissioning, and operations for ASPL's GDT — optimising confinement for neutron yield, characterising and mitigating MHD instabilities in mirror geometry, and working toward first plasma.
responsibilities: Lead GDT D-D plasma design, commissioning, and operations
Optimise plasma confinement for maximum neutron yield
Characterise and mitigate MHD instabilities in mirror geometry
Design and interpret plasma diagnostic systems (Thomson scattering, spectroscopy, neutron detection)
Achieve and sustain the first-plasma milestone
Plan the medium-horizon transition from D-D to D-T operation
requirements: PhD in Plasma Physics, Fusion Science, or equivalent
Hands-on experience with magnetic mirror / GDT devices or with tokamak / stellarator plasmas
Plasma diagnostics (Thomson scattering, spectroscopy, neutron detection)
5+ years of relevant research or operational experience
preferred: Direct GDT experience (Budker Institute alumni particularly welcome)
Publications in plasma physics or fusion engineering journals
benefits: Co-authorship on ASPL publications and patent filings (the default for technical roles)
Conference travel support (ANS, IEEE NPSS, IPAC, ASTRO, IAEA technical meetings and equivalent)
Direct mentorship from Prof. Prabhat Ranjan and Prof. Y.C. Saxena, plus weekly working-group technical syncs
Founding-team scope: shape your domain end-to-end as part of a small team scaling up
Core collaboration hours 10:00–18:00 IST with flexibility outside that window
